app.title: CVI
app.subtitle: Clipboard to Simulated Typing
tooltip.listen_switch: Automatically sync clipboard text into the main text box.
tooltip.hotkeys_switch: Enable input and multi-slot hotkeys; when off, only the buttons can trigger actions.
tooltip.setting.custom_interval_enabled: Off by default. Turn it on to show the adjustable typing interval.
tooltip.setting.typing_interval_mode: Default uses the built-in interval; custom interval uses a fixed delay; target duration computes the delay from text length.
tooltip.setting.auto_clipboard: Read the latest clipboard text automatically and show it in the main text box.
tooltip.setting.clear_after_typing: Clear the main text box after each simulated typing run.
tooltip.setting.disable_hotkey_when_clip: Release the input hotkey when there is no clipboard text, so native paste still works.
tooltip.setting.toggle_ime_with_shift: Helps reduce mixed Chinese and English typing issues under Chinese IMEs.
tooltip.setting.typing_mode: Default mode simulates Shift+Enter; single-line mode replaces line breaks; split mode types one line at a time.
tooltip.setting.single_line_replacement: Choose the character used to replace line breaks in single-line mode.
tooltip.setting.input_encoding: Decoding strategy for incoming text. Clipboard text is usually already Unicode, so auto-detect is the default.
tooltip.setting.output_encoding: Encoding used when exporting debug logs and other text files.
tooltip.setting.newline_backend: Developer experiment: select the Shift+Enter backend used by default mode.
tooltip.mode.default: Simulates Shift+Enter for ordinary input boxes.
tooltip.mode.single_line: Replaces line breaks with Space or Tab for inputs that do not require exact formatting.
tooltip.mode.split: Splits clipboard text into lines and types one line per hotkey press for high-risk chat inputs.
tooltip.setting.multi_slot_enabled: Show 10 slots and type their content with Alt+1 through Alt+0.
tooltip.setting.close_to_tray: Closing the window hides it to the system tray instead of exiting.
tooltip.setting.startup_on_boot: Start automatically when you sign in to Windows.
tooltip.setting.remember_settings: Save current settings and restore them on the next launch.
tooltip.setting.close_popup_on_blur: Close child windows automatically when clicking outside them.
tooltip.setting.developer_mode: Show the developer debug window and control debug log categories.
tooltip.setting.debug_window_position: Record child window size, coordinates, DPI, and follow-move data.
tooltip.setting.debug_newline_behavior: Record how new lines are handled during typing, including Enter, Shift+Enter, and key press/release order.
tooltip.export_debug_log: Export the current debug log as a text file.
tooltip.clear_debug_log: Clear the current in-memory debug log.
label.disable_hotkey_when_clipboard_empt: Do not capture hotkey when clipboard text is empty
label.toggle_ime_with_shift: Switch IME before and after typing
label.author: Author
status.hotkey_released_empty: Hotkey released because clipboard text is empty: {hotkey}
status.interval_invalid: Typing interval must be between 0.1 and 10000 ms
status.target_duration_invalid: Target duration must be between 1 and 10000 ms
help.body:
1. Copied text appears in the raw clipboard box, and the processed candidate appears in the input candidate box.
2. Press the input hotkey, Ctrl+V by default, to type the candidate text as simulated keyboard input.
3. Modes include Default, Single-line, and Split: Default simulates Shift+Enter, Single-line replaces line breaks, and Split types one line per hotkey press.
4. Typing interval modes include Default, Custom interval, and Target duration. Very short target durations are limited by system scheduling precision.
5. If the clipboard has no text, CVInput releases Ctrl+V so native paste keeps working.
6. If the target app runs as administrator, run CVInput as administrator too.
7. If mixed Chinese and English input behaves oddly under a Chinese IME, enable IME switching before and after typing.
about.author: Shrink
about.notes: Chat apps such as WeChat or QQ may handle simulated line breaks differently; use Single-line mode or Split mode when line breaks are risky. Very short target durations are limited by system scheduling precision, and IME switching depends on an installed English keyboard layout.
about.long_description:
CVInput turns clipboard text into simulated keyboard input. The main window uses two text boxes: the upper box keeps the raw clipboard text, and the lower box contains the input candidate. Typing always uses the candidate text.

Input modes: Default mode keeps line breaks and simulates Shift+Enter; Single-line mode replaces line breaks with Space or Tab; Split mode splits text by line and types one line per hotkey press.

Typing interval modes include Default, Custom interval, and Target duration. Target duration computes the per-character delay from the current text length so the run finishes close to the requested duration.

CVInput can switch to an English input layout before typing and restore the previous layout afterward. Developer mode provides window and newline debug logs with export support.
